## Summary

What changed and why.

## Affected interfaces / modules

- ABC(s) touched:
- Module(s) touched:

## Hard-constraint review

- [ ] No Mamdani fuzzy logic introduced.
- [ ] No per-shot Aer Python hooks introduced.
- [ ] No PyTorch / TensorFlow / JAX dependencies introduced.
- [ ] No Poetry / PDM / conda / Docker introduced.
- [ ] All public APIs have type hints and docstrings.

## Tests

- [ ] Tests added or updated for changed code.
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally.
- [ ] `ruff check . && ruff format --check .` passes.
- [ ] `mypy --strict src/superconducted` passes.

## Documentation

- [ ] Implementation doc added at `docs/implementations/YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.md`.
- [ ] ADR added or updated in `docs/decisions.md` if a locked decision is being
      revisited.

## Owner sign-off

Tag the module owner from `docs/team.md`.
